title: rootless v2 podman pod create returns error
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->
I am packaging podman for mageia linux, and I've run into a problem I suspect is because I am packaging configuration files incorrectly.

When I run podman pod create with the git version of 20200417, I get

[joe@big-apple libpod-241326a9a8c20ad7f2bcf651416b836e7778e090 (master)]$ podman pod create 
ERRO[0000] CNINetworks can only be used with Bridge mode networking 


**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. build version git
2. Run podman pod create

**Describe the results you received:**

error message

**Describe the results you expected:**


**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

I very s

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
(paste your output here)
```

comments.body:
Here is the error for 20200507

``
[joe@big-apple SPECS]$ podman pod create
ERRO[0001] Error freeing pod lock after failed creation: no such file or directory 
Error: error adding Infra Container: cannot join CNI networks if running rootless: invalid argument
```

It's version 2.0.0 prerelease.  Running from master.

When I dump out the c.config.Networks, I get the network slirp4netns
It looks to me like the networking changed between v1 and v2, and without a configuration file, podman defaults to v1 options which breaks v2 networking.  Thoughts?

Podman v2 right now is not very stable, so it's entirely possible that this is a bug in master. I'll take a look.

If you're looking to package, I'd recommend trying the v1.9 stable branch for now - it's going to be receiving bugfixes and other backports for some time, and it's a lot more stable than master is now.

It' packaging for cauldron the bleeding edge part of Mageia.  Since we aren't releasing that soon, I prefer to work a little on the wild side.

Thanks for looking into it.  My suspicion is that without a config file that the defaults are being set to something odd.
I get slightly different error messages, but the same general theme - it looks like rootless `pod create` is setting the default network namespace configuration incorrectly. Should be a simple fix.

Cool.  If you need some help fixing it, just point me to the relevant code
and I can take a look.

One thing about podman v2 is that it seems faster.

在 2020年5月8日 週五 03:05，Matthew Heon <notifications@github.com> 寫道：

> I get slightly different error messages, but the same general theme - it
> looks like rootless pod create is setting the default network namespace
> configuration incorrectly. Should be a simple fix.
>
